title: Amtech - Set of Small Wire Brushes for Cleaning, Made from Tough Steel, Glass, and Nylon, Versatile Choice of Sizes with 1/4” Hex Drive Shank, Comfortable Handle, Extended Reach (20pc)
features: VERSATILE CLEANING: Ideal for removing carbon build-up in pipes, internal threads, drilled holes and plumbing fittings.
MULTI-MATERIAL BRUSHES: Steel, brass and nylon heads deliver effective cleaning across different surfaces and residues.
POWER TOOL READY: 6mm hex shank design works with drill attachments for quicker, more controlled brushing tasks.
EASY REACH: Includes a comfortable screwdriver handle and 150mm extension for improved access in tight or recessed areas.
BUILT FOR DIY & TRADE: A practical tube brush kit that provides reliable cleaning performance for workshops, households and plumbing jobs.
description: Product Description Constructed from tough steel, brass, and nylon, the set of wire brushes withstands rigorous use, so you can trust them with various DIY projects and professional jobs. The brushes are suitable for a wide range of tasks around the home, workshop, and garage, from cleaning drilled holes to cleaning carbon build-up from internal threads and pipes. The set includes 20 brushes with a choice of sizes: 6.35mm, 9.5mm, 12.7mm, 15.9mm, 19mm, and 25.4mm. Each metal brush has a 1/4” hex drive shank. With comfortable handles to reduce hand fatigue, you can work on prolonged cleaning tasks without discomfort. The included 150mm (6”) extension with a quick release chuck lets you easily access tight and hard-to-reach spaces for thorough cleaning.
